items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital posts Q1 2026 NII of $0.48, record commitments of $1.81B up 78%
items.snippet: Hercules Q1 2026 NII was $0.48/share (120% base distribution coverage) on record total investment income of $141.5M, up 18.4% year-over-year.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital elevates Seth Meyer to President, names Andrew Olson CFO
items.snippet: Hercules Capital expands its leadership team, promoting Seth Meyer to President and appointing Andrew Olson as CFO and Head of Corporate Development.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital posts Q4 2025 NII of $0.48; full-year NII hits record $341.7M
items.snippet: Hercules full-year 2025 NII reached a record $341.7M (+4.9%) and total investment commitments hit a record $3.92B (+45.7%) year-over-year.

items.snippet: Hercules closes $287.5M of 4.75% convertible unsecured notes due 2028, including full exercise of $37.5M overallotment, rated BBB+ by Kroll.

items.snippet: Hercules prices $250M of 4.75% convertible notes due 2028 in a private offering, with option for $37.5M additional via overallotment.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital launches $250M convertible unsecured notes offering due 2028
items.snippet: Hercules Capital announces a planned $250M offering of convertible unsecured notes due 2028, with a $37.5M overallotment option.

items.snippet: Hercules full-year 2024 NII reached a record $325.8M (+7.2%) on record investment income of $493.6M; Q4 NII was $0.49/share at 123% base coverage.

items.snippet: Hercules closes $150M class A notes via a new trust subsidiary and $50M private institutional notes due June 2025, raising $200M total.

items.snippet: Hercules upsizes its MUFG credit facility to $545M and SMBC facility to $175M, bringing total credit capacity to $720M.

items.snippet: Hercules Capital appoints Wade Loo, with 40+ years of financial reporting experience, to its board of directors effective July 1, 2021.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital to redeem $75M of 5.25% notes due 2025 in Q3 2021
items.snippet: Hercules announces intent to redeem all outstanding ~$75M of its 5.25% notes due 2025 in Q3 2021, incurring ~$1.46M non-cash charge.

items.snippet: Hercules Q1 2021 NII was $0.30/share with NAV increasing to $11.36; company declares $0.28 supplemental distribution payable over four quarters.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital receives Baa3 investment grade rating from Moody's
items.snippet: Moody's assigns Hercules Capital an investment grade Baa3 corporate and credit rating with a stable outlook.

items.headline_ai: Hercules Capital closes $50M 4.55% notes due March 2026, completing $100M institutional bond offering
items.snippet: Hercules completes its $100M institutional bond offering with a $50M tranche of 4.55% notes due March 2026, adding to the initial $50M 4.50% notes.

items.snippet: Hercules Q4 2020 NII was $0.37/share with NAV surging 9.7% to $11.26; full-year 2020 NII rose 9.7% to a record high.

items.snippet: Hercules closes a $100M private bond offering comprising $50M of 4.50% notes and $50M of 4.55% notes, both due March 2026, rated BBB+ by Kroll.

items.snippet: Hercules Q3 2020 NII was $0.34/share (106% base coverage) with record Q3 new debt and equity commitments of $514.3M.
